title: chrysogrammitis glandulosa
intro: Chrysogrammitis glandulosa, also known as the tree fern, is a type of evergreen fern species that belongs to the family Polypodiaceae. The medicinal properties of Chrysogrammitis glandulosa lie in its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestive health, and exhibit antioxidant properties. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to treat digestive issues, alleviate stress, and support immune system function. Chrysogrammitis glandulosa can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
